name: @moolam/cognitive-core
description: Internal component of Sutra SDK — applications should install sutra-sdk. The cognitive core. Domain-agnostic composition of the cognitive primitives (memory, model, reasoning, speech, vision, tools, planning, knowledge) into one perceive-recall-reason-act-reflect loop.

scripts.test: node --test tests/core_loop.test.mjs tests/turn_spans.test.mjs tests/privacy_golden_turn.test.mjs tests/plan_stage.test.mjs tests/plan_stage_integration.test.mjs tests/tool_stage.test.mjs tests/act_stage_integration.test.mjs tests/tool_policy.test.mjs tests/tool_policy_risk_class.test.mjs tests/tool_audit.test.mjs tests/durable_profile_snapshot.test.mjs tests/durable_session_seed.test.mjs
